description: CompositionBlue round neck short sleeve t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a softly ribbed neckline and graphic lettering on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Dare to show your carefree attitude to the world? This blue tantra tee will prove to the world that you aren't bothered by stuff that everybody else believes in. Team this with jeans or shorts, and live life like the happy-go-lucky person that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
